description: Seed publishes a governance view, then replace=true HEADS withdraws the old root set before the seed asks for the stale view again
notes: Simulator uses a view-capable seed so the normal transcript advertises a governance view via VIEW_ANNOUNCE before the fault is injected.
The injected replace=true HEADS should withdraw the old root set so a later WANT for the stale view object is rejected as unreachable from accepted sync roots.
